rationale: In the citing PDF, the 2012 paper is not only listed as background; it is directly tied to the operationalization of key dependent variables (fit and extension evaluation) in multiple studies. The authors also invoke it as prior evidence for the core empirical relation between perceived fit and extension evaluation. This gives the citation a concrete design and interpretation role in the 2021 paper, beyond a passing mention or grouped literature list.
relation_description: The citing paper uses Monga and Gurhan-Canli (2012) as prior empirical grounding that mindset-level factors can shape brand extension judgments and explicitly adopts its brand extension fit/evaluation measures. It also cites the paper when motivating the fit-to-evaluation linkage used in its mediation analyses.
